briefdescription.para: Interrupt on both rising and falling edges.
Microchip EIC (External Interrupt Controller) line identifiers.
EIC ISR callback used to notify the GPIO layer of an interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: Bitmask of GPIO pins that triggered (bit n => pin n).
User/driver context pointer associated with the GPIO port.

briefdescription.para: Configure and enable an EIC interrupt for a given pin.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the EIC interrupt for the specified pin, including setting up the trigger type, enabling input, configuring debounce if required, and updating the internal data structures to reflect the new assignment of pin to an eic line.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the EIC pin configuration structure.

simplesect.para:
0 on success, or a negative error code on failure:
-ENOTSUP if no EIC line is available for the pin.
-EBUSY if the EIC line is already in use.

briefdescription.para: Get the pending EIC interrupts for a given port.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks which pins in the specified port have pending EIC interrupts. It returns a bitmask where each set bit corresponds to a pin with a pending interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: The identifier of the port to check for pending interrupts.

simplesect.para: A bitmask indicating which pins in the port have pending interrupts. Each bit set in the return value corresponds to a pin number with a pending interrupt.

briefdescription.para: Disables an EIC interrupt for a given pin configuration.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the EIC interrupt associated with the specified pin configuration. It checks if the pin is currently assigned to an EIC line, disables the interrupt line if so, and updates the internal data structures to mark the line as free.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the EIC pin configuration structure.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: EIC driver header file for Microchip eic g1 peripheral.

detaileddescription.para: This can be used to access the APIs implemented for the eic driver.
